# Clínica Hispana La Caridad — Houston, TX

> Hispanic medical clinic in Houston, Texas. Walk-in care 100% in Spanish, 7 days a week from 9 AM to 9 PM. USCIS-certified Civil Surgeon for I-693 immigration medical exams. Rated 5.0 stars on Google with 370+ reviews. No insurance needed — affordable self-pay pricing.

## About

Clínica Hispana La Caridad provides professional medical care 100% in Spanish for the Hispanic community in Houston. Walk-ins welcome every day, no appointment needed. No insurance needed — affordable self-pay pricing for everyone. USCIS-designated Civil Surgeon for Green Card immigration medical exams.

## Location

- Address: 5705 Fondren Rd STE 101, Houston, TX 77036
- Phone: (832) 925-8135
- Email: clinicalacaridad2016@gmail.com
- Coordinates: 29.7187891, -95.5195062

## Hours

Open every day of the week, including weekends, from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM. Walk-ins accepted throughout all open hours — no appointment needed.

## Service Area

Houston metropolitan area including Spring Branch, Sharpstown, Westchase, Alief, Bellaire, Meyerland, Gulfton, and surrounding neighborhoods. ZIP codes primarily served: 77036, 77057, 77074, 77042, 77063, 77081, 77096.

## Credentials

- USCIS-designated Civil Surgeon for immigration medical exams (Form I-693)
- Licensed medical professionals
- Bilingual staff (Spanish primary, English available)
- 5.0 star rating on Google with 370+ verified patient reviews

## Pricing

Affordable, transparent self-pay rates — no insurance needed. We accept cash and credit/debit cards. Call (832) 925-8135 for current pricing on specific services.

## Languages

- Spanish (primary — all consultations available in Spanish)
- English (also available)

## Payment

No insurance needed. We offer affordable, transparent self-pay pricing and accept cash and credit/debit cards. Uninsured patients welcome.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do I need an appointment?
A: No. Clínica Hispana La Caridad accepts walk-ins 7 days a week from 9 AM to 9 PM. Call (832) 925-8135 if you prefer to schedule.

Q: Are you open on Sundays?
A: Yes. We are open every day of the week including Saturdays and Sundays, 9 AM to 9 PM.

Q: Do you accept patients without insurance?
A: Yes. We offer affordable cash pricing for uninsured patients with no hidden fees.

Q: Do you speak Spanish?
A: Yes. Our entire staff is bilingual. All consultations and medical care available 100% in Spanish.

Q: Are your doctors USCIS-authorized for the I-693 immigration medical exam?
A: Yes. We have a USCIS-designated Civil Surgeon on staff. You can verify any clinic's authorization on the official USCIS Find-a-Doctor tool. We complete the I-693 form same-day in most cases.

Q: How long does the I-693 immigration medical exam take?
A: Most patients complete the full I-693 exam, lab work, and vaccination review in a single visit. The signed form is ready the same day in most cases.

Q: Do you offer Spanish-speaking women's and men's health care?
A: Yes. Both our gynecology and men's health consultations are conducted in Spanish.

Q: What forms of payment do you accept?
A: Cash and credit/debit cards. No insurance needed — affordable self-pay pricing.

For appointments or questions, call (832) 925-8135 or visit our clinic at 5705 Fondren Rd STE 101, Houston, TX 77036. Walk-ins welcome every day 9 AM to 9 PM.
